entry.title: Re: Update Exchange rate in a posted Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi @Nathan_Fellows 

You cannot update the exchange rate for a document which has been posted. You need to reverse the document first and than post again with the correct exchange rate. 

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud: What’s New as of 2024-02-05?
entry.content:
Hello again SAP community members! 

We just finished the first month of 2024 and with that we are excited to walk you through the new features that SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud (PaPM) Standard Model have delivered to your SAP PaPM Cloud Tenants. From Content Network, Reports Management Screen, and many more. 

As per usual, to make it simpler to find all the blog posts published from the past year/month, you can use this tag: PaPMCloudSMWhatsNew 

Without further ado, let me walk you through the contents of this what's new article for SAP PaPM Cloud. 

Modeling Screen

In relation to the new ‘Manage Data’ button that was recently introduced when creating or using an existing Model Table which will direct the users to the Show Screen where the data can be maintained, the tooltip text of button leading to Show Screen in header when Model Table is selected has been enhanced to display ‘Manage Data’. 

OLD

NEW


Report Management Screen

Edit Mode for Qualitative Reporting
The Report Management Screen has introduced a new feature wherein authorized users can set a report into edit mode. Once a user accesses a report, the report would be displayed in read-only mode wherein options under Edit and Editor in the header including add and delete report tab are disabled. The Edit button can be chosen to enable edit mode for the current report.

Upon choosing the Edit button under General section in the header, the Save and Discard Changes buttons would be visible. Options under Edit and Editor would also be enabled for user to utilize along with the possibility to add and/or delete report elements and report tabs.  

If the user has made changes to the report and chooses the Save or Save All button, all changes made in the report would be saved and the report would be displayed again in read-only mode along with the successful message shown in the message logs. 

If Discard Changes button is chosen and there are still unsaved changes to the report, a dialog box informing user that changes are that changes are not saved would appear with the following options: 

  • Save and Continue – proceeds to save changes in the report 
  • Continue – proceeds to refresh the report and no changes would be saved 
  • Cancel – cancels the action

In case that user tries to access the same report then chooses the Edit button while it is being edited by another user, a lock icon would be visible in the header along with a notification message informing that the report is currently locked by another user and cannot be edited. 

When the user working on the report has been inactive in the report for 12 minutes, a dialog would appear informing that the time for editing the content is about to expire: 

  • Continue Editing – will allow the user to continue working on the report. 
  • Save - will save all the changes made and will unlock the report. 
  • Discard - will discard the changes and will unlock the report. 

The report would automatically be unlocked if the user who locked the report has been inactive for 15 minutes. 

Show/Analyze Screen

The buttons which allow users to upload and download data from the Show and Analyze Screen have been renamed to “Upload” and “Download”.
Note: The functionality of data upload and download remains the same in the Show and Analyze Screens. 

OLD
Analyze Screen 

Show Screen

NEW
Analyze Screen

Show Screen

Content Network Screen

Uploading Content 
When user uploads content to the Content Network screen, user will be redirected to the Upload Status page which shows the status of the upload along with the path where the content was uploaded. 

Once upload is done, the newly uploaded content will be available in the Content Network screen after refresh.

Downloading Content 
An information pop-up would now be displayed for user upon choosing the Download button of selected content informing users that the file needs to be scanned before download. The download process would be triggered once the OK button is chosen.

I hope you enjoy reading this blogpost content with the latest updates coming from SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud. Till the next what's new content

entry.title: Re: SCM-14003 - Allow labelling nominees as Emergency Cover
entry.content:
@daniellanunes

Hi Daniel,

I have a query related to Emergency cover option, is there a way we can change the default icon appearing for the emergency cover candidates. I couldn't find any option to do so.

Ruchi

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Associate – Process Data Analyst - SAP...
entry.content:
Here are topic areas

Here are topic areas

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 21% - 30%

 

Provide, explore and analyze a data set by by creating an investigation to reveal process inefficiencies.

 

  • Analyzing Business Processes

Process Mining 11% - 20%

Explain the fundamentals of process mining and identify the basic data requirements in process mining projects

  • Analyzing Business Processes

SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub 11% - 20%

Navigate through process information and collaborate with other business users to share feedback on process content

  • Analyzing Business Processes

SAP Signavio Process Insights 11% - 20%

SAP Signavio Process Insights

  • Analyzing Business Processes

Plug & Gain 11% - 20%

Plug & Gain

  • SAP Signavio Plug and Gain

Business Process Management <= 10%

Explain the areas of business process management and define the process levels and its architecture.

  • Analyzing Business Processes

SiGNAL <= 10%

Explain and use SiGNAL as query language to explore process data and analyze in more depth.

  • Analyzing Business Processes

entry.title: X Bar, R & mR control Charts to be generated based on a custom logic
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Our business is seeking to generate 6 Sigma control charts directly from SAP, rather than using Excel as we currently do. While QGC3 transactions can generate control charts, they do not meet our specific requirements. Our business logic necessitates comparing the results of the last 60 inspection lots to plot the control chart based on the output. Additionally, we require the same Excel functionalities, such as filtering charts based on the filter condition system to regenerate the control charts. We would greatly appreciate any guidance on this issue by providing FMs or references. Please be aware that our business SAP version is EHP6, and we need to generate these charts within this version. Thank you for your help.

Regards,
Sanoob Thambi / 9003050156

entry.title: Sending addional IDOCs to SAP MII
entry.content:
Hi,

it is possible to sent other IDOCS like ORDERS04, CREMASxx or ADRMASxx to SAP MII and create an own workflow for that?

The idea is to sent the cutomer data to SAP MII and then we create a workflow to store this data in SAP ME (Customer Maintenance).

Or we will copy the data from ORDERS04 into a legacy MES.

Best regards,

How do i resolve this issue ?

entry.content:
You can use app Manage Characteristics, please refer to Fiori library below.

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('CT04')/S31

Thanks，

Helen

entry.title: Re: ONE VALUATION AREA WITH MANY PLANTS..?!!
entry.content:
Hi,

This is one to one relationship. Valuation Area is the level at which u need ur Material to be valuated.

SAP recommend Plant as valuation area.

Valuation Area

Organizational level at which material valuation is carried out. You can define a valuation area as follows:

Valuation area = company code
All stocks of a particular material in this company code are valuated together.

Valuation area = one plant
The stocks of a particular material in this individual plant are valuated together. Stocks in other plants are not included in this valuation area

entry.title: Load infotype's table data in report
entry.content:
I am new to report generation and I want to load data from an infotype IT2001.

I have declared tables: PA2001.

now, what could be the code to load the data into an internal table?

entry.title: Report Showing duplicate invoice in single item invoice
entry.content: SELECT T0.DocEntry,t0.docnum as 'Invoice No', --T0.[U_CustomersGRNNo],T0.[U_GRDate], M.[BeginStr] as 'Prerflix',T0.[NumAtCard], (SELECT Top 1 X.[County] FROM CRD1 X Where T0.CardCode = X.CardCode)as'County', T0.[DocDate],T0.[CANCELED], T0.[TaxDate], T0.[CardName], a.[ItmsGrpCod], a.[U_ItemSubGroup], a.[SalUnitMsr], (case when t0.gsttrantyp='GA' then 'GST Tax Invoice' when t0.gsttrantyp='GD' then 'GST Debit Memo' else 'Bill Of Supply' end ) as 'Document Type', --(Select N.[U_BPSubGroup] From OCRD N Where T0.CardCode = N.CardCode)as'BP Sub Group', t3.bpgstn, t0.paytocode as 'Bill To', t0.shiptocode as 'Ship To', T1.[OcrCode], (Select top 1 T.[Location] from OLCT T where T.Code=t1.LocCode ) as 'Location', T3.[BpGSTN] as 'BP GSTIN', (SELECT Top 1 S.[Name] FROM CRD1 R INNER JOIN OCST S ON R.[State] = S.[Code] Where T0.CardCode = R.CardCode )as'State', T1.[ItemCode], T1.[Dscription],A.[FrgnName],T1.[Quantity],T1.[U_NoOfPkgs], T1.[U_DNo], T1.[U_QtyInKG], l.ItmsGrpNam, T1.[Weight1],T1.[LineTotal]-(T1.LineTotal*T0.[DiscPrcnt]/100) 'Basic Value', T1.[PriceBefDi],T1.[Price], T0.[RoundDif],T1.[DiscPrcnt],T0.[DocTotal],-- A.[U_ProductGroup], A.[U_SubGroup], t2.chapterid,---T8.[DistNumber],T8.[MnfDate], T8.[ExpDate], --(SELECT X.[U_GST] FROM [@UOM] X where X.[Name] = T1.[unitMsr])as'Unit1', T1.[PackQty], --(SELECT X.[U_GST] FROM [@UOM] X where X.[Name] = a.[SalPackMsr])as'Unit2',T1.[Quantity], t1.price, T1.[LineTotal]-(T1.LineTotal*T0.[DiscPrcnt]/100) 'Basic Value', (SELECT top 1 ISNULL(T7.stccode,0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-120 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum)'IGSTRate%', (SELECT ISNULL(sum(T7.TaxSUm),0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-120 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum and t7.expnscode=-1 )IGSTAmt, (SELECT top 1 ISNULL(T7.stccode,0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType= 8 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum)'TCSRate%', (SELECT ISNULL(sum(T7.TaxSUm),0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType= 8 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum and t7.expnscode=-1 )TCSAmt, (SELECT top 1 ISNULL(T7.stccode,0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-100 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum)'CGSTRate%', (SELECT ISNULL(sum(T7.TaxSUm),0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-100 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum and t7.expnscode=-1 )CGSTAmt, (SELECT top 1 ISNULL(T7.stccode,0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-110 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum)'SGSTRate%', (SELECT ISNULL(sum(T7.TaxSUm),0) FROM OINV T5 INNER JOIN INV1 T6 ON T5.DocEntry=T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN INV4 T7 ON T5.DocEntry=T7.DocEntry Where T7.StaType=-110 AND T6.LineNum=T1.LineNum AND T5.DocEntry=T0.DocEntry AND T6.ItemCode=T1.ItemCode AND T6.LineNum=T7.LineNum and t7.expnscode=-1 )SGSTAmt, (case when t1.VisOrder=0 then (select sum(distinct t.basesum) from inv4 t where t.expnscode in (1,2,3,4) and t.docentry=t0.docentry) when t1.VisOrder>=1 then 0 end) as 'Freight Amt', (case when t1.VisOrder=0 then (select sum( t.taxsum) from inv4 t where t.expnscode in (1,2,3,4) and t.docentry=t0.docentry) when t1.VisOrder>=1 then 0 end) as 'Freight Tax Amt', (case when t1.VisOrder=0 then (select top 1 t.stccode from inv4 t where t.expnscode in (1,2,3,4) and t.docentry=t0.docentry) when t1.VisOrder>=1 then '' end) as 'Freight Tax Rate', T1.[LineTotal],H.[SlpName],T0.[U_VehicleNo], T0.[U_Destination],T0.[U_Transporter],T0.[U_LRNo], T0.[U_LRDate], T0.[U_Ewaybill], T0.[U_TransporterGST] FROM dbo.OINV T0 left JOIN dbo.INV1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] INNER JOIN NNM1 M ON T0.[Series] = M.[Series] left JOIN dbo.OITM a ON T1.[ItemCode] = a.[ItemCode] left Join dbo.OITB l on a.ItmsGrpCod = l.ItmsGrpCod left JOIN dbo.OCHP T2 ON a.[ChapterID] = T2.[AbsEntry] left join dbo.inv12 t3 on t0.docentry=t3.docentry INNER JOIN dbo.OLCT T4 ON T1.[LocCode] = T4.[Code] LEFT JOIN DLN1 T5 ON T1.BaseEntry = T5.DocEntry And T5.BaseLine = T1.LineNum LEFT JOIN ODLN T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry INNER JOIN OSLP H ON T0.[SlpCode] = H.[SlpCode] left outer join IBT1 I1 on T1.ItemCode=I1.ItemCode and (T5.DocEntry=I1.BaseEntry and T5.ObjType=I1.BaseType) left outer join OBTN T8 on T8.ItemCode=I1.ItemCode and I1.BatchNum=T8.DistNumber LEFT Join WTR1 T16 On T16.DocEntry=T1.BaseEntry and T16.LineNum=T1.BaseLine left outer join IBT1 I11 on T1.ItemCode=I11.ItemCode and (T16.DocEntry=I11.BaseEntry and T16.ObjType=I11.BaseType) left outer join OBTN T18 on T18.ItemCode=I11.ItemCode and I11.BatchNum=T18.DistNumber WHERE T4.[GSTRegnNo] =[%2] and T0.[DocDate] >=[%0] AND T0.[DocDate] <=[%1] and T0.Canceled = 'N' AND T0.GSTTranTyp NOT IN('GD') And T1.[TargetType] Not In ('14')

entry.title: Re: SNRO for number range
entry.content:
Hi @jbrotto 

Technically yes, the no ranges can be transported. However, I would never recommending the no ranges, as it is prone to more issues, such as overlap of number in the range for the object, corruption of data (if transactional data exists)etc.

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I'm thrilled to express my interest in the digital skills initiative as a final year engineering student, passionate about embracing new technologies and enhancing my skill set. As a woman in the field of engineering, I recognize the importance of continuously upskilling to remain competitive in today's dynamic job market.

I am particularly eager to delve into the realm of SAP technology, specifically aiming to obtain the C_SAC_2402 Data Analytics certification. With its widespread application across industries, mastering it would not only broaden my knowledge but also significantly enhance my career prospects.

Thank you for spearheading such a valuable initiative. 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Data Discovery using ChatGPT in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: What kind of impact can ChatGPT have on how my team makes decisions using data in SAP Analytics Cloud?

entry.title: Re: Time Off: Differentiating Workflow Triggering
entry.content:
I am strugging with below scenario:

 

Fiscal yearLeave SDLeave EDNo of DaysInclude in Count for Current FY
2022-2330-Mar-2304-Apr-235No
2023-2401-Jan-2402-Jan-242Yes
2023-2430-Mar-2404-Apr-245Yes

Current Financial Year: 2023-24 (1-Apr-23 to 31-Mar-24)

If Leave count exceeds certain number of days say 10 days in a fiscal excluding the previous fiscal leave record which is cross financial year record trigger the approval Single Approver, exceeds 30 days 2 approvers beyond 50 days 3 approvers.

My Biz rule.

The issue with my rule is that it is not summing up the Second Value in Second Section with First

It adds up First and Second(First Value) and not the Second (Second Value)

entry.title: Re: Planning and Staffing in Plan Customer Project using...
entry.content:
Thanks, I found the information in Scope Item J11

"Note Once the integration with the external resource management system is activated, the project manager cannot staff an employee ("Requested Resource" is for planning purposes) in the Plan Internal Projects (F1656) app. Staffing assignments must be made from the external system only. "

entry.title: Re: MAINTAIN A STORAGE LOCATION
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is SAP Documentation for your reference.

Maintain storage location

A storage location is the place where stock is physically kept within a plant.

A storage location has the following attributes:

  • There may be one or more storage locations within a plant.
  • A storage location has a description and at least one address.
  • It is possible to store material data specific to a storage location.
  • Stocks are managed only on a quantity basis and not on a value basis at storage location level.
  • Physical inventories are carried out at storage location level.
  • A storage location can be assigned to a warehouse number in the Warehouse Management System. You can assign more than one storage location to the same warehouse number within a plant.

Storage locations are always created for a plant.

Activities

Maintain your storage locations.

If you have integrated the inventory management of your manufacturing execution system (MES) with the system using the data replication framework (DRF) and message INVCON, assign the relevant business system from the replication model to the production storage locations that are managed by the MES. If relevant, choose the type of inventory management, in order to activate the respective checks on goods movements to this storage location.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Multiple backend sessions
entry.content:
If this is a known bug, so forget my questions. Can you show where you see these sessions?

I am assuming you have a single destination with a single data variable on a single page with standard flow functions for fetching the data? Are you saying that each time the preview app goes to do a fetch it creates a new session instead of reusing the previous one?

I am assuming this does not happen in the web preview? Do you know if this happens in a deployed version?

And finally, this is something new, meaning this did not happen a few weeks ago (i.e., before BTP authentication was enabled in preview app)?

entry.title: Re: MAINTAIN A STORAGE LOCATION
entry.content:
Isn't the meaning of Maintain : to keep in good condition ? I don't understand how this answer the question. Can you explain more please?

A storage location has the following attributes:

  • There may be one or more storage locations within a plant.
  • A storage location has a description and at least one address.
  • It is possible to store material data specific to a storage location.
  • Stocks are managed only on a quantity basis and not on a value basis at storage location level.
  • Physical inventories are carried out at storage location level.
  • A storage location can be assigned to a warehouse number in the Warehouse Management System. You can assign more than one storage location to the same warehouse number within a plant.

entry.title: How can be combine two model (import and Live data) at story Optimize design in SAC
entry.content: How can be combine two model (import and Live data) at story Optimize design in SAC.

entry.title: Re: Return/ disassembly process in production
entry.content:
Hi,

Please let me know how this work in Process industry .

entry.title: Can we create email approval workflow through SAP Build WorkZone?
entry.content:
HI Team,

I have IBP as my planning system. For certain risk-buys, i need to trigger emails for approval from IBP (or Workzone) to C level executives so they can approve it. However, these approvers shouldn't have to get into the system for approving (neither IBP nor workzone. They should be able to approve or reject direct from the email that they receive.

SAP workflow allows you to do it. However, i wanted to check if any of you have done it through Workzone? Any other suggestions to achieve this would be appreciated as well.

Thanks for your time. 

Regards, Kunal

entry.title: Re: MAINTAIN A STORAGE LOCATION
entry.content: In other words, maintaining storage locations refers to the process of configuring and managing specific physical or logical areas where materials are stored within a company's warehouse or inventory system.

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Service From and Service To dates
entry.content: Hi Ryan, Thanks for the question. I do not think that your requirement is covered with the standard pre delivered custom logics available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. You might have to submit a improvement request - https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/930 Best Regards Dave

entry.title: Re: Can SAP.GETDATA and SAP.SETDATA be used with the measure model?
entry.content:
@SP9 

Measures is also entered like dimension and members

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: How do I extract the YEAR from the Hierarchical DATE...
entry.content:
@sabananthan 

Try the below. Adjust your Model name.

[d/"Test Model":Date].[p/YEAR] in the formula for calculated dimension.

Nikhil

entry.title: How do I set up a correct SAC model with SAC connection to IBP via OData service?
entry.content:
Hello, 

May I please get advise on Gross Margin Story build. Gross Margin and Gross Margin % are two measures creted in IBP and imported into SAC. 

Gross Margin has a base planning level = Day | Product | Location | Customer | Currency | Currency To

                                                               = Calculated to sum up values

Gross Margin % has a base planning level = Day | Product | Location | Customer | Currency

                                                                   =Calculated to average values

The data pulls correct in IBP excel planning view for both measures (Key Figures), but in SAC(model), only the Gross Margin pulls correctly. The Gross Margin % pulls incorrect data, a much higher value. 

Anyone who can please help on the above issue?

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content:
This is a cool tip ... how have you used this capability to help you?

I can see in Mevi's blog it used for some sort of "transport" of pages/components, but anything else?

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content: Hi Kathlyn, personnaly, I'm using the trial plateform for training purposes. Currently following the ABAP Backend developer.

entry.title: Re: How to change the form title of the dunning notice ou...
entry.content:
The form title of the dunning notice is usually defined in the form template. To change the form title of the dunning notice, you may need to customize and assign the custom form template in the S/4HANA public cloud. You can refer to below help document. Additionally, there is an insightful blog that offers step-by-step instructions (located in the appendix section).

How to Create and Use a Custom Form Template | SAP Help Portal

Output Management – Customize Master Form for Logo... - SAP Community

 

Thanks,

Helen

entry.title: Re: EML to create Sales Order not working
entry.content:
Hi Oleg, what do you mean by External API? I created a separate root view with a separate BDEF and called its action in my behavior implementation class assuming that the other BO is external to my BO, so commit would take place by the time it reaches back to the callee EML, but unfortunately it does not happen :(.

I am trying to call other BO's action in my BO action like this and expecting the actual response in the MAPPED, FAILED, and REPORTED params - 

 

MODIFY ENTITIES of zc_cds_sales_order_2
ENTITY sales_order
EXECUTE Create_SO
FROM Value #( (  %key = keys[ 1 ]-%key ) )
     MAPPED   DATA(ls_mapped)
     FAILED   DATA(ls_failed)
     REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_modify).

 

 

Am I doing it wrong?
Thank you in Advance.

entry.title: How to calculate Cost of Commissioning.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement where I have to calculate the Cost of Commissioning from SAP for particular affiliates/Plant (WERKS column technically). I am not from SAP background to know which t-code or table can give this particular info. And I also heard that this Cc (Cost of Commissioning) will not come directly in one column or line item like Acquisition ... 

So, I require from which T-code, or any residing table can give this Cc (Cost of Commissioning) from SAP.

For more info pls do let me know.

Thanks in advance:)

entry.title: Parallel Cursor vs LOOP AT WHERE, which is faster?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I want my code to look short and also perform fast and I need some expert to confirm which is the right way from below two.
PARALLEL CURSOR CODE:
Sadly we cant shorten this with new syntaxes. (maybe line_index can help?)

LOOP AT WHERE CODE:
This is shorter to code, but I am sure its not faster.

Maybe parallel cursor can be written with line_index since it is similar to READ TABLE TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS. Is it advisable?

 


Thank You!

entry.title: Error in My Leave Requests "WF_CONT/065" Specify a class name
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In the Fiori App "My Leave Requests"(SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (ondemand.com) we get the error message "Specify a class name (WF_CONT/065)" when changing a rejected leave request:

Does anyone here know what the reason could be?

entry.title: Re: Printing Error: Full Document could not be printed: r...
entry.content: Hi, The value of the margins was already set in 0 and I get the same error.

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content:
Really great idea for the commenting.

1) Can you perhaps add that to the tips discussion, if you haven't already? https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/what-s-your-favorite-tip-for-using-sap-build-apps/m-p/13641529

2) I didn't really understand the tip for searching for styles -- how do you find styles? And for searching variables -- do you mean that if I have a Set page variable and I set ABC to something, it shows ABC on the flow function and then I can find that with the browser tools?

entry.title: Re: table of type select-options
entry.content:
HI 
   We can build the internal table for select-options, filed sign, option, low & high
SE11 - DATA TYPES - RSDSSELOPT (This is the standard table)

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content: This is a general problem with logic, and me and my colleagues were suggesting a place where I can see all my logic -- because I may have a variable that is not acting properly and I want to find all places where it is set, but it is difficult to know where all the logic is hidden.

entry.title: SAPUI5 / Analytical List Page: Download Chart as Image
entry.content:
According to this post, in SAPUI5 1.40 a new feature has been introduced to download a SmartChart as an image. The download button can be enabled by setting the showDownloadButton = true. The ALP UI Adaption Documentation says the same. 

I have created an Analytical List Page with SAPUI5 Version 1.84. I tried setting the showDownloadButton in the mainfest.json, but I do not see any change in the UI. I also tried other properties mentioned in the docs like setting showLegendButton = false without any effect. 

Am I putting these properties in the wrong location or does anyone know why these settings have no effect on my ALP? 

 "pages": {
      "AnalyticalListPage|ZCAQ_CO_MYAPP": {
        "entitySet": "ZCAQ_CO_MYAPPResults",
        "component": {
          "name": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.AnalyticalListPage",
          "list": true,
          "settings": {
            "contentTitle": "{{contentAreaTitle}}",
            "defaultFilterMode": "compact",
            "condensedTableLayout": true,
            "showGoButtonOnFilterBar": true,
            "autoHide": true,
            "smartVariantManagement": true,
            "showDownloadButton": true, //does not work
            "qualifier": "MainChart",
            "tableSettings": {
              "multiSelect": false,
              "type": "AnalyticalTable"
            },
            "chartSettings": {
              "showDataLabel": true,
              "showDownloadButton": true //does not work
            },
...

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content: Sounds good... But I don't quite understand how you can copy an element from a logic and paste it into VisualStudio to find the code there ?????

entry.title: Re: Automatic alternative BOM selection
entry.content:
Firstly, when running the MRP, the BOM selected will be defined in Plant parameters.

SPRO->Production->Plant Parameters->Carry out overall Maintenance of Plant Parameters.

The system will choose the 01 BOM as default.

And if you create two production version for B (0001 use BOM 01 and 0002 use BOM 02), and the system will choose the 0001 as default, you should change the production version manually.

Another solution:

According to your requirement, you can consider to using new material numbers, for example A1 B1, since the components updated, you can consider the Header Material was change as well.

entry.title: How to unsubscribe other employee from Web Service Message Monitoring Email notifications in SAP C4C
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to unsubscribe user account which is inactive in C4C from Web Service Message Monitoring Email notifications in SAP C4C.

Regards,

Muheed Syed

entry.title: Re: Adding a Text field to an ABAP CDS View via extension.
entry.content:
In my case, I just created a reference field out of Material like this - 

extend view C_ConsumerView with ZC_CONSUMER
  association [0..*] to I_MaterialText as _MaterialText on  $projection.Material3  = _MaterialText.Material

{
  @ObjectModel.text.association: '_MaterialText'
  Material as Material_2,
  _MaterialText
}

and showed this field instead of existing material field by creating a CUSTOMER layered metadata extension on top of existing CORE layered metadata extension.
This way the transactions will not be impacted as data is eventually be saved to the original material field and if it's a display report, we are already set.

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content:
I'll answer it myself, it's great... It works (even with Notepad++)
But I was unable to copy an entire page... Only one component. If we can copy an entire page to find an abandoned variable that would be great.
Thanks again !

entry.title: CAPM OData V4 Fiori Element Analytic Application Time series line chart
entry.content:
📢 Calling all Fiori wizards and CAPM enthusiasts! 🧙‍♂️💼

I need some help! I've developed a sales forecast report using CAPM OData V4, but I'm struggling to make the date dimension a timeseries instead of a normal category. Is this possible with Fiori Element OData V4? I've seen it done with OData V2, but not sure about V4. Any insights or experience with this would be greatly appreciated! Thanks.

#FioriExperts #CAPMChallenge #FioriElementMystery

entry.title: Re: Can we install PaPM on-premise edition as an add-on o...
entry.content:
Hi Amogh,

SAP PaPM On Premise has a built-in Visual Model (similar to PaPM Cloud) edition. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT/56471df1959f4cfd9e3bf7a6d2d5be42/e5adaaae9f3c409f8cde812742c293bb.html?q=visual%20modeler 

This option can be explored if the users would want to have On Premise edition and at the same time have the same UI as what PaPM Cloud edition have. But then again it is on premise. I have attached a link where you can see some details about it.

entry.title: Re: how to effectively use SE37
entry.content:
Hi,

Tcode:se37 > press F4 > SAP Applications

follow the path, you can see all module function.

But I usually use keyword to search on google, like create po + FM/BAPI >> get BAPI_PO_CREATE1

and examples can usually be found, now you can refer the example to use.

Thanks!

entry.title: Error msg during Factory Action - Copy execute in RAP application (BTP)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

BTP - ABAP Environment

I am currently testing the Factory Action - Copy of RAP.

When I select a record in the ListReport screen and click the CopyInstance button, it automatically navigates to the ObjectPage, which is in Draft status.

After clicking Save and returning to the ListReport, if I select the same record again and click the CopyInstance button, the error shown in the attached image appears.

 

However, the Copy action still executes successfully.

I would like to confirm the cause of this issue.

 

Please find the reference code snippet below.

factory action copyInstance[1];
 METHOD copyInstance.

    DATA: lt_head TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE znei_guia02head.

    READ ENTITIES OF znei_guia02head IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY a02head
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(Headers)
    FAILED DATA(Faileds).

    LOOP AT Headers ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_header>).

      APPEND VALUE #(
                      %cid = keys[ KEY entity %key = <lfs_header>-%key ]-%cid
                      %is_draft = keys[ KEY entity %key = <lfs_header>-%key ]-%param-%is_draft
                      %data = CORRESPONDING #( <lfs_header> EXCEPT HeadID )
       ) TO lt_head ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_newHeader>).

    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF znei_guia02head IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY a02head
    CREATE FIELDS ( Canl SumFg criticality3 NetFg Bukrs Belnr Budat Mwskz Hwbas Hwste )
    WITH lt_head
    MAPPED DATA(mapped_create).

    mapped-a02head = mapped_create-a02head.

  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: Re: Editable Query in PaPM Cloud not working on top of Mo...
entry.content:
Hi Soundarya,

This is the expected behavior or Query function if editable option will be enabled. In case of other functions such as Model Table HANA, unfortunately this is not possible to enable the editable option as this is an external table and update or load the data is not possible using Query.

I would suggest to use Writer instead if you want to load/write data into your HANA table.

entry.title: Re: Business Builder in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @cristina_talmaciu 

I remember at the beginning, when the Business Builder came out ... it seemed promising. It added three functionalities for me very interesting, the versions, which help the development of projects and their maintenance, the perspectives, which allowed to expose a subset of fields to the reporting layer (in the style of BW queries) and the calculated ratios that are added in the upper layer (as SAC does).

So we started to work and add it to the projects, mainly for the functionality of the calculated ratios, since it was not necessary to calculate them in SAC, but there were also many shortcomings (some of them were solved over time).

Then the analytical model appeared, SAP said it was the future, but it only had one of the features mentioned above, calculated ratios... so in a way it was a step backwards. But we are "forced" because for example the future "Source Change" functionality in SAC seems that in the case of DSP it will only work with the analytical models. And I seem to remember that there are still some basic things that have not made it to the Business Layer such as the integration of time hierarchies with SAC (it is still there in the roadmap ... years after).

So I think there is no other option, if SAP says they are betting on AM, then they already made the decision for us 🙂

For complex projects and with frequent changes that respond quickly to the needs of analytics users, the Business Builder was ideal, it has versions !!!, the ability to create perspectives and not give a group of users 200 fields that they will not use and that only confuse and annoy them, perspectives are the ideal !!!
... but if the developer himself does not bet on it, I would not bet on it either.

Let's just hope that SAP realizes the good ideas they had for the Business Layer and works on something similar for the Data Layer and the AMs.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: bods job failed- Cache statistics not avalable
entry.content:
Hi Siba,

The screenshot you provided is just a generic warning message which appears when you first execute a job and don't select the option "Collect statistics for optimization" to collect statistics. Activating this will get rid of the warning the next time you run the job.

Please check the Jobserver log files in the <DS_COMMON_DIR>\log\<Job Server>\<repository> directory and see whether you can find the actual error information in there to post it here.

Regards,

Julian

entry.title: Re: How do I extract the YEAR from the Hierarchical DATE...
entry.content: Showing Error :Formula could not be computed: [d/"AM_CONCUR_EXPENSE_SUMMARY":"_VIEW_DIME∞0"] .[p/YEAR]. Please complete or rewrite the formula.

entry.title: EWM replenishment process for quantities assigned to WBS element
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to execute the EWM replenishment process for a quantity assigned to a WBS element ?

If yes, how to do that and what kind of replenishment type should I use ?

By the way, I can not use these replenishment types:

- "Order related", because is NOT part of an OBD process;

- "Crate", because is NOT part of the production integration process (PMR);

Best regards,

/Flavio Marcilio Silva

entry.title: Re: How do I extract the YEAR from the Hierarchical DATE...
entry.content: @N1kh1l

entry.title: join two queries to obtain a report
entry.content:
Hola ,

tengo dos consultas hechas

La primera convocatoria de movimientos bursátiles:

SELECCIONE T0."DocNum", T0."DocDate", T1."ItemCode", T1."FromWhsCod", T1."WhsCode", T1."Cantidad" DESDE OWTR T0 INNER JOIN WTR1 T1 EN T0."DocEntry" = T1."EntradaDoc"

y la segunda llamada hu asignada a de:

SELECCIONE T0."DocEntry", T0."DocNum", T0."CreateDate", T0."CreateTime", T0."U_HUCode", T2."ItemCode", T0."U_Quantity", T0."U_ObjDocNum", T2 ."BaseRef" FROM "SBO_IPS"."@INFO21AWMSHUTRANS" T0, OIGE T1 UNIÓN INTERNA IGE1 T2 EN T1."DocEntry" = T2."DocEntry" DONDE T0."U_ObjDocNum" = T1."DocNum" AND T2."BaseRef "NO ES UN ORDEN NULO POR T0."CreateDate"

Lo que quiero hacer es que en la primera consulta también obtenga el número hu utilizado (T0."U_HUCode)

entry.title: Re: How to change the form title of the dunning notice ou...
entry.content: Hi Helen, Many thanks for your reply. Probably I was not clear enough. What I am interested in is to change the PDF file title not the PDF content. Do you know how to do so?

entry.title: Re: join two queries to obtain a report
entry.content:
I have two queries made

The first call stock movements:

SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."DocDate", T1."ItemCode", T1."FromWhsCod", T1."WhsCode", T1."Quantity" FROM OWTR T0 INNER JOIN WTR1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"

and the second call hu assigned to of :

SELECT T0."DocEntry", T0."DocNum", T0."CreateDate", T0."CreateTime", T0."U_HUCode", T2."ItemCode", T0."U_Quantity", T0."U_ObjDocNum", T2 ."BaseRef" FROM "SBO_IPS"."@INFO21AWMSHUTRANS" T0 , OIGE T1 INNER JOIN IGE1 T2 ON T1."DocEntry" = T2."DocEntry" WHERE T0."U_ObjDocNum" = T1."DocNum" AND T2."BaseRef "IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T0."CreateDate"

What I want to do is that in the first query I also get the hu number used (T0."U_HUCode)

thank you so much

entry.title: Re: Posting Goods Issue in Freight Orders
entry.content: The bgrfc connection was indeed the problem. The process worked after I've dealt with it

entry.title: Select Hierarchy - Account type dimension - Sap analytics cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

I created a table in a story in SAC, with Measure/Version dimensions in columns and an account type dimension in rows.

I have created multiple hierarchies for the account type dimension and I would like to make possible for the user (in view mode) to select the hierarchy of the account dimension he wants to display. This feature is available for generic dimensions  by right-clicking on the dimension name in the table and selecting the hierarchy you wish to display from the drop-down list, but for the account type dimension, the drop-down list does not allow you to choose

Is user selection of hierarchies possible for account type dimension, and if so, how?
Thanks for the help

 

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content:
Hi
@KorvaSFC @zeitounian @JohnBallard @mihaly-toth-nc @Tinashe_Mukombe 

The product team is investigating the issue.

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content:
I solved this problem.

Firstly i replied any blog. 

After that i fnished SAP comunity tutorial. https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/community-2024.html

Finally stepi gave kudos any blog.

Than my account ranked up o Discoverer. now i can write blog.

entry.title: Re: Table support within forms in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

found the solution. It is necessary to set the Output of the Action Project to mandatory. With this it can be used for the table in SBPA.

entry.title: Re: local element of additional binding with usage: #filt...
entry.content:
Hi,
For the first question, I think you should provide more code here. It's unclear where article and plant group are maintained and being treated.
For the second question, Since, it's RAP app, Have you already tried feature control or validation? If the app is draft enabled, this should help.

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hi Kathlyn,

you can do anything with it what can be done with a SAP S/4HANA 1909 systems platform. 

So it contains the first version of the ABAP RESTful programming model where this is however in its early stages. But we are working on a 2022 version.

So you can work with CDS views and use the modern ABAP programming style that is still evolving.

Think of it as a standalone (but more modern) SAP NetWeaver ABAP As.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content:
Mainly for transportation reasons. 
Let's take a big application for an example. There is one team member who ideates and creates UI prototypes of a component, but doesn't build logic for that component. In order to get the most of the Build Apps Composer he does that in a sample component library mini app. He can see the changes quickly in the preview. When he is done, I just copy and paste that component into our main app and build the required logic for it and then turn it into a custom component. You have pretty good guide of component creation here for reference.

entry.title: Transaction F-02 in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

 

In S4 Hana Public Cloud , Is there any substitute for F-02 transactions? or Can we post transactions using posting keys?

Thank You

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content: The same issue here. Whenever I change anything in my variables, I start thinking if particular variable is used in any place or not - could I delete it safely or not?  🙂

entry.title: Transport from Dev Tenant to Test Tenant
entry.content:
Hello, 

i have created a Dev Object with some Core Data Services and a Business Service in the Dev System (Eclipse). Now i want to transport it to the Test system, because there is most of the data. I thought i would do it through ababGit Staging but its not working somehow. Whats the best solution for this? 

Best regards

entry.title: A function in Webi which gives the position of specific caharacter's occurrence multiple times
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can you please help me with a function in Webi which gives us the position of some character's occurrence multiple times in the same string.
Pos() function gives the position of a character, however if the same character is present multiple times, how to get its position.

For example:
String(1): AP 0,G3 16.36,HK 0,B5 5.62,WY 16.53
String(1) is a column which has this concatenated text and numbers as above.

Now, I need to know the position of all commas and spaces present in this string more than once.

Can u please help me with the formula to get the following splitted from String(1):
String(1): AP 0,G3 16.36,HK 0,B5 5.62,WY 16.53

AP---- =Substr([String(1)];1;(Pos([String(1)];" ")-1))
0   ---  need formula here
G3 -- =Substr([BILLED_TAX_STRING];(Pos([BILLED_TAX_STRING];",")+1);(Pos([BILLED_TAX_STRING];" ")-1))
16.36 -- need formula here
HK    -- need formula here
0       -- need formula here
B5     -- need formula here
5.62   -- need formula here
WY     -- need formula here
16.53  -- need formula here

Please don't Hardcode the values, as we have different values in the report for String(1)
More examples for String(1) values present in the same report:

                String(1)
AP 0,G3 16.36,HK 0,I5 5.62,WY 16.53
AU 30.91,WG 5.22,WY 8.9
L7 1.76,OP 0,SG 3.51,WG 1.6,WY 14.63
QR 7.97,QR 2.32,WG 3.35,WG 0
E7 .78,G8 .34,TS 15.55,WG 0,WY 0
F1 2.47,IA 8.04,KK 11.57,WG 0,WY 0


If anyone can help, would be really helpful.
Thank you in Advance🙏


Regards,
Shilpi

entry.title: MRP created multiple PR For Material Which Has Existing POs Available
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have one material with MRP type as VB, reorder point is 1 and minimum lot size is 2. After running the MRP PR got created for 2 qty. We have converted this PR to PO. Next day when we again run the MRP it again created PR for 2 qty. As the requirement from first PO got fulfill then why MRP again created the PR. Request your help on priority.

 

@SAPSupport @Caetano

entry.title: Re: Business Builder in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
It seems that all the artefacts built under BL will be translated to AM: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/the-sap-datasphere-analytic-model/ba-p/13556451

"The Business Builder is designed to make it possible for certain business users with technical expertise to be able to create and edit data models, and combine central company data with their own data. Objects in the Business Builders are generally based on objects in the Data Builder. The following objects are currently available: Dimension, Analytical Dataset (not to be confused with the semantic Analytical Dataset in the Data Builder), Fact Model, Consumption Model and Perspective. Of these, Fact Model and Consumption Model will be transferred to the new Analytic Model, meaning these objects will also be obsolete in the foreseeable future. The Perspective as an interface to Reporting will also be replaced by the Analytic Model.

The new Analytic Model, therefore, is the successor for a total of four object types in the Data Builder and Business Builder."

entry.title: How to refresh an application screen using SAP iRPA - Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi

I am currently automating TCode VK11 to create Pricing Conditions using SAP iRPA. This TCode involves multiple screens. If there is a system exception in any of the screeen, I want to refresh the entire screen and start over. I can not seem to find an activity which can do this? 

I tried using refresh screen, but it asks for a screen target. However the issue is, I don't know on which screen the error may happen. Is there a better way to handle this? 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 3
entry.content:
Here is my submission 👌

Code JS:

 

...
async function sendCloudEvent() {
    try {
        const response = await axios({
            method: "post",
            url: `${SOLACE_TRANSPORT_PROTOCOL}://${SOLACE_HOST}:${SOLACE_PORT}/TOPIC/dev-challenge/week-3/${SAP_COMMUNITY_ID}/ce`,
            data: body,
            headers: {
                ...headers,
                Authorization: `Basic ${Buffer.from(`${SOLACE_USERNAME}:${SOLACE_PASSWORD}`).toString("base64")}`,
            },
        });

        console.log("Response Status:", response.status);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error:", error);
    }
}

sendCloudEvent();

 

  Result:

entry.title: How to display Unrestricted & Quality Stock by exploding BOM by Function Module CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In Function Module CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2 there are fields that can display the current stock of the BOM components but currently, those are appearing blank in the output. What input should I give to get those values?

FYR,

Please help me to get this value.

Thanks & Regards

Ali

entry.title: Re: Adding a Text field to an ABAP CDS View via extension.
entry.content:
Hello!

Thanks for the reply. I had tried this option too, but when I queried the entity, I got a SHORTDUMP:
The parser produced the error: The field "MATERIALNAME" does not have a corresponding field in the work area.

But good to know this could be an option. I will investigate further what went wrong.

entry.title: Re: local element of additional binding with usage: #filt...
entry.content:
Hi @SachinArtani! Thanks for you reply.

Reg. 1 Question: this is the coding of the custom entity zi_product

 

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_QI_PRODUCT'
define root custom entity ZI_PRODUCT {
  key Product : abap.char(40);
  Plant : abap.char(10);

 

The class determines the products for a given plant or plantgroup and returns the information. A List of Article/Plants is displayed. When a user chooses an entry, the article Id and the plant id are returned to the abstract entity. I thought, when choosing usage: #FILTER (and not #FILTER_AND_RESULT) for the PlantId, the PlantId should not returned to the abstract entity!?

Reg. 2 Question: As mentioned above, this is an abstract entity where there is (to my knowledge) no Behavior implementation possible and therefore no feature control or validation. Or did I miss something. Actually this is my problem!

entry.title: BW4HANA - SICF - Maintain master data error
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When we try to maintain master data, we receive the next error:

"App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.

Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#BWInfoObject-maintainMasterData?ignoreNavigationTargetInSearch=true&iobjName=ZREPOS&sap-app-origin-hint="

I think there is a service missing to activate, could you tell me which one it is?

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Antonio

entry.title: Smartform 2nd page not displayed
Re: SAPUI5 / Analytical List Page: Download Chart as Image
entry.content:
I found out you can set it from code in the onInit event handler of the controller and the button shows up: 

var smartChart sap.ui.getCore().byId("chartId");
smartChart.mProperties.showDownloadButton = true;

 

I would still like to know if it is possible to enable the button via the settings in the manifest.json?

entry.title: Re: How to join T052U with BSEG?
entry.content: I also suffer this problem..

entry.content:
Hi @ruchiaagarwal 

As of now i don't see any option to change it

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 3
entry.content: This example doesn't contain the sapcommunityid but I can see in the monitoring app that you've sent one containing the extension context attribute....

entry.title: Re: Advanced Scheduling Board - F5460
entry.content: Very nice blog, how about resource fixing intervals create/delete from the APB?

entry.title: Re: Performance Forms
entry.content:
Hello @Shananna 

The same translation appears in both forms due to the same translation ID.

entry.title: Re: What's your favorite tip for using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
Let me add another useful trick for the cases when user has several different styles and wants to quickly find one: 

Using the 'ctrl+f' or 'cmd+f' you can use the browsers search to find text on the screen, which would in fact find the right styles for you. 

This is extremely useful also if you need to find a component name in a long list of components (e.g. with a focus input logic node) to programmatically focus an input field: 

This method can also search on the logic canvas through the titles of each logic node. So in case you would rename your logic flows to meaningful names, you could easily find logic that you want to modify:

entry.title: Re: How can be combine two model (import and Live data) a...
entry.content:
Hi VKhatri,
at this point in time this is not supported. Unsupported Features: Visualizations (search for Blended Visualizations).
as @N1kh1l described here you need to push the linking from SAC story back to the data model. E.g. add data from import model to your BW infoprovider when using a live data connection OR upload the data you currently need from your live connection in order to only use an import conn. for your story.
br
edgar

entry.title: Re: Compare attribute to date
entry.content: Thank you Very much. im tried this script but dont understand what im writing wrong appriciate your help

entry.title: Re: Compare attribute to date
entry.content: Thank you Very much. im tried this script but dont understand what im writing wrong appriciate your help : IF INT(YEAR([d/Date])) = [d/LegalDoc].[p/DateStart] THEN Data([d/Measures]="Changes",[d/IAA_GLACCOUNT]="522383200")= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="StartAmount")/RESULTLOOKUP([d/LegalDoc].[p/TermDuration]) ENDIF

entry.title: Re: Compare attribute to date
entry.content: IF INT(YEAR([d/Date])) = [d/LegalDoc].[p/DateStart] THEN Data([d/Measures]="Changes",[d/IAA_GLACCOUNT]="522383200")= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="StartAmount")/RESULTLOOKUP([d/LegalDoc].[p/TermDuration]) ENDIF
